title: Evolution of Social Networks
body: I recommend reading [this post](http://crosstalent.org/2008/04/25/resumen-inusual-crosstalent-3-redes-sociales/) from Inusual Crosstalent about social networks, where, among other things, it is confirmed that the success of these networks lies essentially in their users and in the quality and usefulness of the applications that these or the same social networks provide.
